pending_branches.description: test: add coverage for system messages, tool details, and teammate protocols (25 new tests, 79→104)

notes: npm audit shows 0 vulnerabilities. Tests: 79 on main; PR #33 adds 6 to 85. Branch kanbanbot/test-system-messages-and-tools-20260411 has 25 new tests covering system messages (skip/compact/summary/task-notification), tool detail extraction (pattern/query/url/plan/SendMessage protocols), and teammate protocol types (idle/task_assignment/shutdown/plan_approval). Tests 79→104. Safe-output MCP tools were unavailable this run (second consecutive). All 6 open KanbanBot PRs (#31, #32, #33, #35, #36, #37) merge cleanly into main with no conflicts. Express v5 and chokidar v5 major updates still need issue discussion. CDN dep pinning is future work. Smoke test for /api/version as npm test is future work.
